data.title: Bitfinex report: BTC has been consolidating for 81 days, and traders are waiting for clearer macro signals
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitfinex Alpha Report pointed out that BTC has been in a narrow trading range of $91,000 to $102,000 for the past 81 days, reflecting that traders are waiting for clearer macroeconomic signals before making decisive moves.
The report emphasizes that despite the escalating global geopolitical tensions, BTC has shown little directional momentum. Its weekly performance was only a 4.3% peak-to-trough fluctuation, closing slightly up 0.82%.
This period of stagnation has also affected altcoins, many of which are struggling amid uncertainty. The broader altcoin market has significantly underperformed Bitcoin, and Meme coins such as PEPE have suffered huge losses, falling 46.4% in the past month. At the same time, Bitcoin's price stability indicates that capital is flowing from altcoins to BTC, further consolidating its position as the dominant digital asset.
The global altcoin market value has fallen by $234 billion in just 14 days. Despite this slide, Bitcoin has remained relatively stable, indicating a growing divergence from the rest of the market. This trend highlights Bitcoin’s growing correlation with macroeconomic conditions and its maturity as a risk-on asset.
Another key indicator, the Inter-Exchange Flow Pulse (IFP), turned bearish on Feb. 15 for the first time since June 2024. This shift suggests that traders may be reducing their exposure, which could lead to further downside pressure. However, the IFP remains above its 90-day moving average, leaving room for a potential market rebound.
In addition, Bitcoin investors have recorded the largest actual losses of the current bull cycle. Short-term holders (STH) have been particularly affected. Losses for this group reached $520 million, which is comparable to levels seen during previous market pullbacks. Meanwhile, long-term holders (LTH) continue to hold positions.
Despite some support from bullish catalysts such as Abu Dhabi’s investment in the BlackRock Bitcoin ETF, traders remain cautious. (CryptoSlate)

data.title: RBA cuts interest rates for first time in more than four years
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Reserve Bank of Australia cut its benchmark interest rate by 25 basis points to 4.10%, the first rate cut since November 2020, to a new low since October 2023, in line with market expectations. (Jinshi)

data.title: Reserve Bank Of Australia Lowers Interest Rate To 4.10%
data.description: According to Odaily, the Reserve Bank of Australia has reduced its benchmark interest rate by 25 basis points to 4.10%. This marks the first rate cut since November 2020 and brings the rate to its lowest level since October 2023, aligning with market expectations.

data.title: China Advances New Energy Storage Manufacturing With Emerging Technologies
data.description:
According to PANews, China's Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, along with seven other departments, has released an action plan aimed at enhancing the high-quality development of the new energy storage manufacturing sector. The plan emphasizes the integration of next-generation information technologies such as blockchain, big data, artificial intelligence, and 5G into the industry.

The initiative seeks to accelerate the construction of smart factories and encourages the digital transformation of key processes in the production and system integration of new energy storage products. This includes the application of machine vision, ultrasound, and infrared thermal imaging technologies to optimize quality control systems.

Additionally, the plan aims to improve automation levels in various stages of new energy storage product manufacturing, including raw material production and packaging. It also supports manufacturing enterprises in extending their service chains and developing new service-oriented manufacturing models.

data.title: AscendEX will launch HULE ZHI (HULEZHI)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News AscendEX (formerly BitMax) launched HULE ZHI (HULEZHI) at 11:00 on February 18, opened HULEZHI/USDT trading pairs, and is now open for recharge.
The Meme Research Institute team under the AscendEX platform screened out high-quality Memes for listing based on on-chain data and project background, and the platform's Memecoin initial listing rate reached 80%.

data.title: U.S. Government Efficiency Department Saves $55 Billion In Federal Spending
data.description: According to Odaily, the official website reveals that the U.S. Government Efficiency Department (DOGE) has saved approximately $55 billion in federal spending so far.

data.title: DOGE Team: $4.7 Trillion U.S. Treasury Payments ‘Almost Impossible’ to Track
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The DOGE team led by Musk said that the $4.7 trillion US Treasury bond payment is "almost impossible" to track.

data.title: Elon Musk Confirms Plans For AI Gaming Studio
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 18, overseas blogger Dima Zeniuk shared a photo on the X platform featuring Elon Musk with several individuals, accompanied by a caption stating that xAI is set to launch an AI gaming studio. Elon Musk later confirmed this information, emphasizing the importance of executing the project successfully and reiterating his commitment to 'make gaming great again.'

data.title: Most of the crypto market sectors experienced a significant correction, and ETH rose 1.95% against the trend
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily reported on February 18 that according to SoSoValue data, most of the crypto market sectors experienced a significant correction, with a general 24-hour decline of about 1% to 4%. It is worth noting that ETH rose against the trend, with a 24-hour increase of 1.95%, while Solana (SOL) fell 6.01% due to various factors. In addition, the Layer2 sector rose by 0.15%. Within the sector, Mantle (MNT), Arbitrum (ARB), and Optimism (OP) rose by 5.41%, 1.92%, and 3.69%, respectively.
The AI ​​sector briefly rose before pulling back, with a 24-hour drop of 5.25%. Within the sector, Virtuals Protocol (VIRTUAL) fell 7.90%, ai16z (AI16Z) fell 12.18%, and AI Rig Complex (ARC) fell 26.16%.
In terms of other sectors, the CeFi sector fell 0.84% ​​in 24 hours, the DeFi sector fell 1.64%, the Layer1 sector fell 2.45%, and the PayFi sector fell 3.30%. Within the sector, XRP fell 3.09%, Stellar (XLM) fell 3.62%, but Telcoin (TEL) bucked the trend and rose 29.99%; the Meme sector fell 3.83%.

data.title: Musk confirms AI game studio plan, reiterates "Make games great again!"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News On February 17, overseas blogger Dima Zeniuk posted a photo of Musk and several people on the X platform, and wrote that xAI is about to open an AI game studio. Later, Musk himself confirmed the news, emphasizing that "this matter must be done well" and reiterated "Make games great again!". (Jinshi)
